stories.article: FIFA announced that the winners of the World Cup will receive US-style championship rings for the first time. Ahead of the 2026 World Cup final between Argentina and Spain, Lionel Messi discussed baby photos of Lamine Yamal, a young player on the Spanish team. Experts have also provided odds and predictions for the upcoming final match.

headlines.title: FIFA World Cup Title winners to receive US-style championship rings
headlines.lede: One side will feature the World Cup trophy, while the other will carry details specific to the champions.

stories.article: Tensions escalated as the US and Iran exchanged strikes near the Strait of Hormuz, resulting in infrastructure damage in Kuwait. Meanwhile, Ukrainian drones targeted an oil depot in the Moscow region and several logistics hubs. In domestic news, David Crowley resumed his campaign for Wisconsin governor following Sara Rodriguez's withdrawal due to financial issues. Additionally, Iran’s hardliners have expressed concerns about a potential coup amid pressures on a US-Iran truce.

stories.article: Sir Garry Sobers, widely regarded as one of cricket's greatest all-rounders, has died at the age of 89. In cricket news, New Zealand has taken a 2-1 lead in the One Day International series against the West Indies. The series continues with upcoming matches scheduled between the two teams.

headlines.title: Garry Sobers, cricket’s greatest all-rounder, dies at 89
headlines.lede: ST JOHN’S: Sir Garry Sobers, arguably the greatest all-rounder of all time, has died aged 89, West Indies Cricket...
